response.justification: Mohammed has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tooling (test runners, CI/CD, fluent asserts), and a proven track record of open-source contributions and knowledge sharing, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, team leadership, or organizational change initiatives required for this engineering productivity manager role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical mentorship through workshops
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and systems languages with DevOps infrastructure experience
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership responsibilities
Lacks demonstrable experience leading organizational change or roadmap planning at scale
Mobile platform expertise is implied but not explicitly validated in a production ecosystem context
